headline: Jamie Salter Hands CEO Reins to Maddox, Expects IPO Within a Year
summary: The founder of Authentic Brands Group is becoming executive chairman and will remain on board working on acquisitions.

headline: Authentic Brands Is Finally Going Public
summary: The zombie ship of 90s IP is heading for the public markets at the exact moment teenagers decided 1998 was peak fashion

headline: Authentic Brands Group IPO: CEO change signals public offering
summary: Founder Jamie Salter says he expects the brand licensing company to go public as it names a former Wynn Resorts CEO to lead the firm

raw.headline: Authentic Brands Group IPO: CEO change signals public offering
raw.summary: Founder Jamie Salter says he expects the brand licensing company to go public as it names a former Wynn Resorts CEO to lead the firm

headline: Shares of retail and apparel-related stocks are trading higher amid overall market strength after Iran opened the Strait of Hormuz for the remainder of the ceasefire following a 10-day armistice between Israel and Lebanon. This alleviates the ongoing supply disruption and lessens energy costs.

headline: Wynn Resorts Stock: Analyst Estimates & Ratings
summary: Although Wynn Resorts has lagged the broader market over the past year, Wall Street analysts remain strongly bullish on the stock’s long-term growth potential.

headline: Authentic Brands Group expects IPO in next 12 months, founder tells CNBC
summary: Jamie Salter, founder and executive chairman at Authentic Brands Group, joins ‘Squawk on the Street’ to discuss the reasoning behind Matt Maddox becoming the new CEO, his plans for going public, upcoming deals in the making, and more.

headline: Authentic Brands Group expects IPO in next 12 months as new CEO steps in, founder tells CNBC
summary: Authentic Brands Group, the firm behind Reebok and Champion, is bringing in a public company veteran as its next CEO, signaling it's readying for an IPO.
